heading: Cooperative work
label: 753 Cooperative work
text: On and after , cooperative work conducted by the United States Fish and Wildlife Service shall be subject to the provisions of the Act of [, 2279i].July 2, 1942July 24, 19197 U.S.C. 2220
notes: References in TextAct of , referred to in text, was formerly classified to sections 563 and 564 of Title 5 prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .July 24, 1919Sept. 6, 1966Pub. L. 89–554, § 180 Stat. 378
